crime.value: Murder of Emily's grandmother by a shape-shifting creature
crime.quote: Your granny has been dead for seven years... Do you want to hear the funny part, I killed her.

victim.value: Emily's grandmother, killed while knitting in her room by the escaped shape shifter
victim.quote: she was in your room, knitting and I just managed to escape, I was hungry

closed_world.value: The isolated grandmother's house in the middle of nowhere with restricted access
closed_world.quote: she lives in the middle of nowhere... Emily isn't allowed in that room even if a meteor was about to hit

culprit_and_motive.value: The Shape Shifter killed the grandmother out of hunger after escaping containment
culprit_and_motive.quote: I am the Shape Shifter... she was in your room, knitting and I just managed to escape, I was hungry

investigator.value: Emily, a high school student who discovers the truth accidentally during her visit
investigator.quote: Emily walked further in and she saw something laying down behind the sofa, it was her granny.

red_herring.value: Initial presentation of granny as eccentric but harmless living person, when she has been dead for seven years
red_herring.quote: Your granny has been dead for seven years...Do you want to hear the funny part, I killed her.

clue_fairness.value: House appearing much larger inside than outside, granny's restricted room access, and identical menu repetition
clue_fairness.quote: house is long, on the outside it looks so small but it is brobdingnagian on the inside, like a mansion

social_world.value: Family dynamics of parents sending Emily away during house move, grandmother living in isolation
social_world.quote: my parents say it's because I haven't seen her in ages but I know the real reason

reveal_mechanic.value: Shape shifter's confession revealing true identity and admission of murdering the real grandmother
reveal_mechanic.quote: I'm the thing you fear most...I am the Shape Shifter and I am going to...get...you...too.

media_and_audience.value: Folkloric framing through fairy tale monster archetype and supernatural threat presentation
media_and_audience.quote: the thing in fairy tales, the thing that keeps you up at night, the thing that drives people into mental hospitals

investigator_wound.value: Emily's abandonment by parents and forced isolation making her vulnerable to deception about family care
investigator_wound.quote: they don't want me in the way...she doesn't even care about me
